decision_commentary: Excellent bilingual proposal. Spanish and English versions both complete. Budget figures match Bruno's payment schedule exactly. SOW section accurately reflects Tomás's approved scope including all 6 phases and engineering systems. No placeholders in client-facing text (budget_detail references 'line_items_ref: budget.json' which is an internal reference but not client-facing text per se). State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
